schema.name: TZPID source truth generated from canonical equation master

identity.canonical_title: Level 3 — Hamiltonian Micro Picture (HTZPtunnel and HER Bridge): H_ER

theory.canonical_statement: **H\_ER (Energy-Resonance bridge)** Think of H\_ER as the term coupling the mode manifold to the broader environment/condensate: \[ H_{ER} = \sum_k \lambda_k (a^\dagger + a) E_k + \sum_k \mu_k (b^\dagger + b) E_k. \] If the bridge seam enhances phase coherence and creates a robust channel in the TF manifold, it increases the effective coupling \( \Lambda_{\text{eff}} \) between modes and environment — this is the macroscopic energy transfer path you want to measure.
theory.technical_interpretation: Level 3 — Hamiltonian Micro Picture (HTZPtunnel and HER Bridge): H_ER is a series / summation, written H_ER = ∑_k λ_k (a^† + a) E_k + ∑_k μ_k (b^† + b) E_k.. It is expressed as a sum or series over modes or indices, superposing discrete contributions. It is built from k, a, E_k, b, defining H_ER. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.

formation.note: Introduced in the derivation where think of H\ER as the term coupling the mode manifold to the broader environment/condensate
